rect.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212));
fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 153), rgb(218, 218, 255));

path.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(5, 124, 163), rgb(67, 169, 203));
